holdings.infoBox: CMAG is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 37.43%, US DOLLARS at 13.41%, NVIDIA CORPORATION-SWAP-CANT-L at 11.07%, NVIDIA at 11.00%, and Alphabet at 9.73%.

overview.description: The Corgi Mag 7 ETF (CMAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund invests in the seven US mega-cap technology and technology-enabled companies referred to as the Magnificent Seven. The actively managed ETF intends to weight its holdings based on each company's relative free-float market capitalization. CMAG was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
